title: vec purge-orphan response (v1.0.69)
description: Response shape of `sqlite-graphrag vec purge-orphan --yes --json`. Added in v1.0.69 as part of G39. Purges orphans from vec_memories, vec_entities, and vec_chunks in a single transaction.

action.description: Whether the purge was actually applied or merely previewed

purged.description: Per-table counts of rows deleted (or that WOULD be deleted under --dry-run)
